scripts.install:all: npx npm-run-all --sequential install:swiftlint install:swiftformat install:wasmtime config
scripts.build:wasm: swift build --package-path Examples/TestWasmProject --swift-sdk swift-6.2.3-RELEASE_wasm --product TestWasmProject && mkdir -p assets Examples/WasmOTAExampleProject/Sources/WasmOTAExampleProject/Resources && cp Examples/TestWasmProject/.build/wasm32-unknown-wasip1/debug/TestWasmProject.wasm assets/main.wasm && cp assets/main.wasm Examples/WasmOTAExampleProject/Sources/WasmOTAExampleProject/Resources/main.wasm
scripts.update:submodules: git submodule foreach --recursive 'branch=$(git remote show origin | awk "/HEAD branch/ {print \$NF}"); git checkout $branch && git pull origin $branch' && CHANGED=$(git status --porcelain | grep '^ M \.dotfiles' || true) && if [ -n "$CHANGED" ]; then npm run config; fi && git add -A && git commit -m "chore: update submodules" || echo 'No changes to commit'
